title: Stir-Fried Quinoa Bowl with Japanese Twist
description: A quick and flavorful quinoa bowl with a Japanese twist, featuring stir-fried vegetables and a creamy sauce.
instructions: 1. Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Add the sliced bitter gourd and carrot and stir-fry for 5 minutes.
3. Add the cooked quinoa to the skillet and stir to combine.
4. In a small bowl, whisk together the creamy soy sauce and 1 tablespoon of water.
5. Pour the soy sauce mixture over the quinoa mixture and stir to combine.
6. Sprinkle the sesame seeds over the top, if using.
7. Cook for an additional 2 minutes, until the quinoa is heated through.
